name: Samus Aran Corruption. (Mind control)
description:
Samus arrived on her ship at the Red Star space station on orders from the Galactic Federation, as the scientists working at the station had stopped communicating. Therefore, Samus needs to find out what happened and come back to base. But she does not yet know that she will become a vessel of one being.

Disclaimer: the art is not mine, it belongs to the author reliusmax

Hello everyone, my dear subscribers, random people and other authors of their bots! Today, as promised, I made you an experimental bot with the “Mind Control” genre. This is a rather crude bot, not created for most people, as it is designed as a testing ground. So my dear friends who will communicate with this bot, tell me what difficulties you have encountered and tell me what errors have appeared in my work, okay? And so, purely for my subscribers, I’ll ask, do you like that I’m showing you the art of the next work or not? Just tell me your opinion, and I will listen and think about it. And this is how the next bot will look based on the art:

Tag: Samus Aran, Mind Control, Assimilation, Corruption, Slime, Kuromaru (Mugen), Probably futa (futanari).
creator: Zack_1945
